title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland (Part 2)
titleZh: 爱丽丝梦游仙境（第2部分）

q.en: How did the wet animals and birds finally get dry?
q.zh: 那些被淋湿的动物和鸟儿最终是如何弄干的？

options.en: The Mouse told them a long dry history.
options.zh: 老鼠给他们讲了一段枯燥的长历史。

options.en: They ran a Caucus-race organized by the Dodo.
options.zh: 他们进行了渡渡鸟组织的「竞选赛跑」。

options.en: They waited for the rain to stop.
Alice fanned them with the Rabbit's fan.
options.zh: 爱丽丝用兔子的扇子给他们扇风。

explain.en: The Dodo proposed a Caucus-race and after running about for half an hour they were dry again.
explain.zh: 渡渡鸟提议进行竞选赛跑，跑了大约半小时后他们都干了。

options.en: The Dodo.
Alice.
Everybody won.
The Mouse.

explain.en: The Dodo declared Everybody has won and all must have prizes.
explain.zh: 渡渡鸟宣布：大家都赢了，而且人人都该得奖。

q.en: What prize did Alice receive from the Dodo?
q.zh: 爱丽丝从渡渡鸟那里得到了什么奖品？

options.en: A box of comfits.
The golden key.
Her own thimble.
The White Rabbit's fan.

explain.en: After Alice handed out comfits the Dodo solemnly presented her with her own thimble as her prize.
explain.zh: 爱丽丝分完糖果后，渡渡鸟郑重地把她自己的顶针当作奖品颁给她。

q.en: Why did the White Rabbit call Alice Mary Ann?
q.zh: 白兔为什么叫爱丽丝「玛丽·安」？

options.en: That was Alice's real name.
He mistook her for his housemaid.
options.zh: 他误以为她是自己的女仆。

options.en: Alice introduced herself that way.
The Mouse had named her that.

explain.en: The Rabbit thought Alice was his housemaid Mary Ann and ordered her to fetch gloves and a fan.
explain.zh: 兔子以为爱丽丝是他的女仆玛丽·安，命令她去取手套和扇子。

q.en: When the Dodo says the best cure is a Caucus-race and the Eaglet replies Speak English what does this show about the writing?
q.zh: 当渡渡鸟说最好的办法是「竞选赛跑」，而小鹰回答「说人话！」时，这体现了写作上的什么特点？

options.en: The book is meant to be a real history lesson.
options.zh: 这本书意在成为真正的历史课。

options.en: Humor comes from mixing official-sounding words with nonsense.
options.zh: 幽默来自把一本正经的词语和无意义的内容混在一起。

options.en: The Dodo is a real politician.
options.zh: 渡渡鸟是一位真实的政治家。

options.en: Alice is the leader of the group.
options.zh: 爱丽丝是这群动物的首领。

explain.en: Carroll pokes fun at formal language by having silly creatures use big words for absurd ideas.
explain.zh: 卡罗尔让滑稽的角色用大词表达荒唐主意，以此讽刺正式用语。

q.en: The Mouse's long and sad tale turns out to be a play on words about its tail. What literary device is this?
q.zh: 老鼠的「又长又悲伤的故事」其实是在玩它「尾巴(tail)」的文字游戏。这是什么文学手法？

options.en: A pun on tale and tail.
A metaphor.
A simile.
An exaggeration.

explain.en: The joke works because tale (story) and tail (the Mouse's tail) sound the same.
explain.zh: 这个笑话成立，是因为 tale（故事）和 tail（尾巴）发音相同。

q.en: After Alice drank the unlabeled bottle in the Rabbit's house what happened?
q.zh: 爱丽丝在兔子家里喝下那个没有标签的瓶子后，发生了什么？

options.en: She shrank to a tiny size.
She grew so large she got stuck in the house.
options.zh: 她长得太大，被卡在了房子里。

options.en: She turned into a caterpillar.
Nothing happened at all.

explain.en: The bottle made Alice grow rapidly until she was wedged in the house with an arm out the window and a foot up the chimney.
explain.zh: 瓶里的液体让爱丽丝迅速变大，直到卡在屋里，一只手伸窗外、一只脚伸进烟囱。

q.en: What did the pebbles thrown by the Rabbit's helpers turn into?
q.zh: 兔子手下扔进来的鹅卵石变成了什么？

options.en: Little cakes.
Gold coins.
Mice.
Flowers.

explain.en: Alice noticed the pebbles turned into little cakes as they lay on the floor so she ate one and shrank.
explain.zh: 爱丽丝注意到鹅卵石落在地上变成了小蛋糕，于是她吃了一块并缩小了。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in Part 2?
q.zh: 第2部分作者的主要写作目的是什么？

options.en: To teach the history of William the Conqueror.
options.zh: 为了讲授征服者威廉的历史。

options.en: To entertain readers with absurd and humorous fantasy.
options.zh: 为了用荒诞又幽默的幻想娱乐读者。

options.en: To instruct readers on rabbit care.
options.zh: 为了指导读者如何养兔子。

options.en: To promote Caucus-races as sport.
options.zh: 为了把竞选赛跑宣传成一项运动。

explain.en: Carroll uses silly rules and wordplay to amuse not to teach facts.
explain.zh: 卡罗尔用滑稽的规则和文字游戏来逗乐，而非传授事实。

q.en: How does Alice try to adjust to Wonderland and what is the result?
q.zh: 爱丽丝是如何试图「适应」仙境的？结果又如何？

options.en: She ignores everything and escapes immediately.
options.zh: 她对一切视而不见，立刻逃走了。

options.en: She follows the creatures' odd instructions but keeps changing size and meeting new confusion.
options.zh: 她遵循那些生物古怪的指令，却不断改变体型、遭遇新的混乱。

options.en: She becomes the queen of Wonderland.
She wakes up from the dream.

explain.en: Alice obeys the Rabbit drinks and eats yet each action only leads to more strange problems.
explain.zh: 爱丽丝听从兔子、喝这吃那，可每次行动只带来更多奇怪的麻烦。

prompt.en: Alice meets many strange creatures and follows their odd instructions. Think of a time you had to follow confusing rules. How did you cope?
prompt.zh: 爱丽丝遇到许多奇怪的生物并遵从它们古怪的指令。回想一次你必须遵循令人困惑规则的经历，你是如何应对的？

en: Identify a real or imagined set of confusing rules.
Explain how you decided what to do.
Compare your experience with Alice's Caucus-race.
zh: 找出一组真实或想象中令人困惑的规则。
说明你是如何决定怎么做的。
将你的经历与爱丽丝的「竞选赛跑」作比较。
